title: The Crushing Dark
lines: Thinking for a moment that speed is your only chance, you try to force your way through the narrowest part of the wooden tunnel.
Your shoulders get jammed. You struggle, but only wedge yourself tighter into the splintery planks.
Your ribs eventually buckle as you can no longer even take a full breath. The tunnel, or whatever is made of, slowly contracts.

options.desc: Wake up back at the tent
